title: elaeocarpus dolichodactylus
intro: Elaeocarpus dolichodactylus, also known as the 'Celtis' or 'Pili', is a plant species that belongs to the Elaeocarpus genus, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus dolichodactylus include its ability to treat parasitic infections, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and sore throats. Elaeocarpus dolichodactylus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
